name: Zephyrus Draconis
lore: When the Primordial Dragon fell, its soul was shattered into six fragments of avatars that would later be referred to as the Dragon Knights, or the Draconis siblings. Zephyrus is the third sibling, wielding the elemental power of wind...

abilities.name: Gale Blades
abilities.details: Zephyrus has 5 Gale Blades that orbit him closely, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/] and [as]attack speed[/]) to any enemy they pass through.[n]Zephyrus's basic attack throws 1 of these 5 Gale Blades instead.[n]When a Gale Blade is away from Zephyrus, it lingers on either the enemy or at the area briefly before homing back to himself.[n]When returning, the blade does not do damage. Zephyrus is unable to basic attack if he runs out of blades.

abilities.name: Razor Array
abilities.details: Zephyrus commands all of his Gale Blades to strike a target location in a rapid sequence.[n]If consecutive blades strike the same target, they deal [bf]bonus stacking damage[/], causing successive hits to deal more damage than the previous one.

abilities.name: Crippling Volley
abilities.details: Zephyrus throws all of his Glade Blades in a cone in the target direction.[n]Crippling Volley also [db]slows[/] the enemies hit for a short duration. The slow debuff can stack on the same enemy if hit by multiple blades from this ability.

abilities.name: Sky Soar
abilities.details: Zephyrus spreads his wings, gaining increased [ms]movement speed[/] and the ability to [ms]travel through terrain[/] for a duration.

abilities.name: Swirling Vortex
abilities.details: Swirling Vortex is only usable while Sky Soar is active. When casted, Zephyrus locks onto a target enemy hero and begins flying in a circle around them.[n]While orbiting, Zephyrus automatically launches his Gale Blades at the target. The firing rate and homing speed of the blades scales with Zephyris's [as]attack speed[/].[n]Zephyrus can choose either clockwise or anti-clockwise for the orbit direction.[n]Zephyrus cannot use other abilities or basic attack during the orbit, but can cancel the ability early by recasting Swirling Vortex.
